feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.desc: Report bugs or suggest new features

liveUplink.title: Live Support
liveUplink.desc: Direct access to human or AI support

register.question: How do I register for a Zhihui AI account?
register.answer: You can register using your phone number, WeChat, or email. New users receive 50,000 Zhihui credits upon registration.

credits.question: What are Zhihui credits?
credits.answer: Zhihui credits are the platform's virtual currency used to pay for API calls. 1 RMB = 100 Zhihui credits.

apiKeyLeak.question: What should I do if my API Key is leaked?
apiKeyLeak.answer: Please delete and regenerate it immediately in the console, and check if your account usage records are normal.

quality.question: How can I improve the quality of generated content?
quality.answer: You can significantly improve results by providing more specific prompts and setting clear role backgrounds.

help.supportTip: If you didn't find an answer to your question above, you can contact us through the following ways
